message:
test: add CLI bundles, accessibility, admin, health, SEO, and perf tests (bd-33yj, bd-bmqr, bd-165n)

New test files:
- CLI: bundles.test.ts (6 tests for bundlesCommand/bundleShowCommand)
- Accessibility: announce.test.ts (12 tests), focus.test.ts (16 tests)
- Admin: permissions.test.ts (15 tests for RBAC, token auth, dev bypass)
- Health: checks.test.ts (12 tests for ready/status checks)
- SEO: sitemap.test.ts (23 tests for route generation and XML output)
- Performance: web-vitals.test.ts (10 tests for thresholds and metrics)

Total: 94 new tests across 7 files. All suites green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
